rationale: Educ. Code §11.302 governs public information availability for school districts; it is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict.
quote: The governing body of a school district or county system to which Section 11.301 applies shall make available to the public for inspection and copying during regular operating hours a copy of the provisions under which the district or county system operates that are specific to that type of district or county system.
_note: Rule text concerns public information disclosure, not homestead exemption amounts. No overlap with proposed change.
